title: Better Trials Loot
description:
Improves the trial chambers' loot in a vanilla-friendly way, making it look more like loot fountains. Also improves all other loot found in the chambers.

Server-side mod
body:
**This is a server-side mod! Only the host needs to have this installed for it to work!
If you have it installed and join a server, nothing happens.**

## **Loot fountains**

- Trial spawners and chests will dispense considerably more items (increased with luck), making them look like loot fountains!



## **More loot:**

- All chests, barrels, spawners and trial chests will have more items inside them
- Increased loot variety (including iron, gold and copper ingots, blocks related to the trial chambers, rare items, etc)
- Luck effect increases loot from all sources

## **Some of the loot:**

- Good equipments and tools are rare, but they exist
- Small (very small) chance of getting mending books, so you don't need to interact with those pesky villagers
- XP bottles! They aren't really OP and, unless you get super lucky, you'll just find a couple
- Bucket of axolotl (I put it there because I can, but it's super rare)
- Milk buckets (rare, but you can get rid of annoying effects now)
- Super rare Netherite Scrap and Smithing Template (rarer than the Mace)

## **This can make it harder for you to get a Mace!**

I recomend to use this mod/datapack together with something like Revault, Trial Vault Restock, NoVaultLimit, etc, since that will allow you to get loot multiple times from the same vault. All of these mods are different and it's personal preference which one you choose. Have fun :)


**IF (AND ONLY IF) you know what you are doing, you can edit and tweak the datapack as much as you want, to suit your preffered Trial Chambers experience and needs :)**



**In case you want to edit it, some stuff you need to know:**
- **"Weight":** The chance of stuff appearing (1 = super rare | 100 = super extremely common)
- **"Rolls":** The number of items that will appear from a chest, spawner, etc
- **"Bonus Rolls":** Number of extra items that you get if you have the Luck potion effect
- If you really want to change everything, there's a pretty good page on the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Loot_table) about this
